Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Murrok]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Murrok is an independent planet in the Free Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Murrok is a destination mentioned by Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — Murrok is a lead that Horizon wants to follow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Murrok is an inhospitable planet that challenges Dornoth IV's title of 'worst planet in the galaxy'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Murrok's atmosphere is filled with toxic clouds from volcanoes on every continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The oceans of Murrok are a dull, brown sludge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The native life-forms of Murrok are mostly insectoid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Murrok's human population is concentrated in twenty-eight arcologies located in tower-cities on its three continents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Murrok is a World Spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Murrok has eyes made of large diamonds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Murrok has teeth of pale stone and a tongue of soil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Murrok is a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — Murrok stated that the Advocates do not know what they have regarding the Shadow Ark.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
